title: OFF TO DENTIST — Eva clutches Sara's hand
prompt: Wide shot in @driveway, warm golden morning sunlight. The gray Tesla Model 3 sedan is parked on the asphalt driveway. @Mama stands in the FOREGROUND beside the open rear passenger door, smiling gently. @Sara on the LEFT walks calmly toward the car. @Eva on the RIGHT walks half a step behind, smaller, gripping Sara's hand firmly with both of her own, eyes wide and worried. Eva (small whisper, looking up at her sister): "Don't let go!" Sara (squeezing back, steady): "Never. Sister-promise." Eva (taking a deep brave breath): "…sister-promise."
